title: Usage-based public developer API
idea: A public REST API that enriches company domains with firmographic data (employee count bands, funding stage, tech stack hints). Pricing is pure usage-based: $0.02 per successful lookup, free tier 500 calls/month. Auth is API keys only (no OAuth yet). Data is scraped and licensed from mixed sources; refresh SLA promised as 'weekly'. Target customers are B2B SaaS sales tools that batch-enrich CRM lists overnight.
focus_notes: Abuse / key leakage and unbounded batch jobs
Versioning / breaking changes for CRM integrators
Unit economics when free tier + scrapers dominate cost
